## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `swift build` succeeds.
- [ ] I tested the affected shortcut, transcription, polishing, or translation flow.
- [ ] I did not add recordings, model weights, credentials, or private data.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation are updated where needed.

## Upstream and license

- [ ] I have the right to contribute this code under GPLv3.
- [ ] Third-party code or assets are identified with their license and source.
